utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh hey ! How was your audition ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I am sorry , do I know you ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: What are you doing ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Nothing , I am just practicing blowing you off because I am gonna be a big movie star !

emotion_cause.span: 4_I am gonna be a big movie star !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh ! You got it ? !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Well no , not yet . But the audition went really good .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: What was it for ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh , it is this big budget period movie about these three Italian brothers who come to America around the turn of the century .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: It is really classy !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh , and the director is supposed to be the next next Martin Scorcese .

emotion_cause.span: 10_the director is supposed to be the next next Martin Scorcese .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: The next next ?

emotion_cause.span: 10_the director is supposed to be the next next Martin Scorcese .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Yeah , there is this guy from Chicago who supposed to be the next Martin Scorcese , all right ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: But then this guy right after him .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hello !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: They loved me !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh my God !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Are you kidding me ? I never rent a movie without it ! Oh . Uh , okay uh let me call you back .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: What the matter ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: They want me to be totally naked in the movie !

emotion_cause.span: 19_They want me to be totally naked in the movie !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Wow !

emotion_cause.span: 19_They want me to be totally naked in the movie !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I know ! My grandmother gonna see this !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Grandma gonna have to get in line .
